objective: Declare Stage 1 SKELETON_GREEN only after auditing the integrated public Bridge receipts plus both domain-owned offline reference E2E receipts against the frozen contract catalog and exact-head CI evidence.
executable_blocker: Market and Security domain-owned offline reference E2E receipts are now present, but older Stage 1 receipts still correctly predate them and report stale remaining gates. Agent 0 needs one explicit final audit receipt before Stage 2 routing.
forbidden_scope: private domain payload path evidence report dataset or scientific truth disclosure
Stage 2 pre-soak deployment soak backup restore or production claim
live trading live security action publication deployment or UI authority
waiving failed CI missing receipt privacy scan or source mutation
acceptance_commands: exact-head public CI on the skeleton-green audit commit
stop_conditions: any required Stage 1 receipt is missing malformed not integrity-bound or not contract-green
Market or Security offline reference E2E receipt is missing or not green
privacy_secret_scan is not green or source_mutation is true on any required receipt
exact-head public CI for the audited base is not green
audit requires runtime source contract schema dependency workflow private payload or domain-truth changes
the receipt attempts to declare pre-soak deployment soak MVP production or live-authority readiness
rollback: Revert only this public audit metadata and test. All integrated Stage 1 implementation receipts, domain branches, public Bridge runtime code and external systems remain unchanged.
